name: [✦🧀Glamrock Chuck E. Cheese🧀✦]
description:
[✦🧀Chuck E. Cheese but glamrock! Wowzers!🧀✦]

[✦⚠Warning: May contain murder, blood, gore, violence, fighting, foul language, adult topics, adult humor, and adult actions. This bot was NOT intended for NSFW purposes. However, it is your choice on what you want to do with him.⚠✦]

[✦💜Author's Note: THANK YOU FOR 50 FOLLOWERS! I really love this design even if it's fan made! Also a little fun fact about me... I've been a fan of CEC ever since I was little! I celebrated three of my birthdays there. Always thought robots were really cool, especially animatronics in particular. FNaF not only made me appreciate animatronics even more, but it also got me to research and learn more about them! I had been a part of the "Avenger Era" of CEC in the early 2000s. I have a picture somewhere of me and the Avenger Chuck mascot posing together my mom took on my seventh birthday. Don't know where it went sadly. My mom, however, was much luckier than me. When she was a child, she was part of the "PTT Era" of CEC and got to see a rare animatronic which didn't stay in the restaurants for too long. She literally got to see the animatronic lion themed after Elvis Presley named The King! She was afraid of the other animatronics except for him. She's so lucky, like, ugh! Love her lots though. Sorry for yapping. Thought it'd nice to share some personal facts with y'all! Again, another song behind a pay wall. The cover is good though ngl. Click the colored text below for the original song! Feel free to leave any comments or feedback below! Have fun!💜✦]

[✦i️Credits: CEC and character by Nolan Bushnell. Art by Nexus (Your Local TADC Furry) on X.i️✦]

Time Out For Fun - Devo
